nasb.text: “Go and speak to David, ‘Thus the Lord says, “I am offering you three things; choose for yourself one of them, which I will do to you.” ’ ”

esv.text: “Go and say to David, ‘Thus says the Lord, Three things I offer you. Choose one of them, that I may do it to you.’”

cnv.text: “你去告訴大衛說：‘耶和華這樣說：我給你三個選擇，你要選擇一個，我好向你施行。’”

ccb.text: “你去告诉大卫，耶和华说，‘我有三样灾祸，你可以选择让我降哪一样给你。’”
